form.formComment: Last start 5th (Sr2) over 1635m at Temora was 7th-12.3 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Oak Ridge (2:00.30) in NR 42 to 48 on April 6 at $15. The run previous was well back in the run when 6th (Fr6) over 1760m at Junee, at the bell was 8th-15.4 beaten 7 m by Sokys Falcon (2:10.80) in NR 40 to 48 on March 31 at $26. Big chance from the inside draw.

form.formComment: Well-beaten 14 days ago at Junee over 1760m, before that 8th (Sr2) over 1760m at Junee beaten 35 m by Thats The Attitude (2:10.80) in NR 47 to 48 on March 17 at $51. This looks a tough task.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 600m hung in, raced roughly and gave ground.

form.formComment: Two-year-old gelding by Tiger Tara out of Shes All Business having his first start. Finished third at Leeton in a trial on March 30 over 1758m. In a good yard so keep safe from a low draw.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two-year-old gelding by Tiger Tara out of Shes All Business having his first start. Finished third at Leeton in a trial on March 30 over 1758m. In a good yard so keep safe from a low draw.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 6 m finishing fifth behind Sokys Falcon at Junee over 1760m in a NR 40 to 48 on March 31 at $18. Then a handy effort when a close second behind Oak Ridge at Temora over 1635m in a NR 42 to 48 on April 6 at $3.40. Has definite claims.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into sixth behind Feelgood Ray at Riverina Paceway over 1740m in a NR up to 47 on April 4 at $4.80. Raced better the start before that with a good run when 3rd (Fr2) over 2270m at Riverina Paceway was 2nd-3.6 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Betterthantheboyz (2:45.90) in NR up to 48 on March 20 at $2.80. This suits.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into seventh behind Hezaflashone at Riverina Paceway over 1740m in a NR up to 47 on March 27 at $11. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Ideal Andy at Temora over 1635m in a 2 WINs on April 6 at $8. Expected to go well again.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr6) over 2270m at Riverina Paceway well beaten by My Ultimate Franco (2:42.50) in NR up to 48 on March 20 at $16. Two runs back 5th (Sr3) over 1760m at Junee beaten 5.5 m by Thats The Attitude (2:10.80) in NR 47 to 48 on March 17 at $9. May do better.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr7) over 1740m after being wide early at Riverina Paceway, beaten 23 m by Feelgood Ray (2:04.90) in NR up to 47 on April 4 at $16. At the start before broke in score up and was out of position at the start 9th (Sr1) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway, at the bell was 6th-13.3 beaten 13 m by Kristysgirl (2:05.30) in NR up to 47 on March 27 at $17. Consider.
